reference: After a chest X-ray, my doctor told me I have a heterogeneous opacity in the right middle lobe. I am not sure what that means and what it is. I am not sick, but he is treating me with Ciprofloxacin and wants a follow-up X-ray in thirty days. What causes this and is it serious? I am sixty-eight years old.
text: After I checked that day, my doctor told me I had a happier dinner that was happening in the night and alone. I am not sure about how I am and how it is. I am not sure, but how you're feeding me these sickle blocks with them and how to follow up after every 30 days. What causes this means is food. I need to see you in the way.
